gaze_path.title: Gaze movement
gaze_path.caption: Cumulative estimated on-screen gaze path as the clip plays.

focused_gaze.title: Focused gaze
focused_gaze.caption: Each 1-second window coloured blue if gaze stayed locally compact.

screen_coverage.title: Screen coverage
screen_coverage.caption: Cumulative fraction of the 16×21 screen grid visited by gaze.

gaze_path.title: Gaze movement
gaze_path.caption: Estimated on-screen gaze path per minute across all trials. Each point is one trial; intervals show mean ± 1 SD.

focused_gaze.title: Focused gaze
focused_gaze.caption: Percent of 1-second windows where gaze stayed locally compact. Each point is one trial.

screen_coverage.title: Screen coverage
screen_coverage.caption: Fraction of 16×21 grid cells visited by gaze over the full trial. Each point is one trial.
